textByHashes.06a070bd922fefc21bf29ab0df3c3a7a4d0571a0: You think things will turn out okay?
textByHashes.47c9fce226cc1317a5cbc3e32fc49320153e0020: Oh no, please don't leave me alone!
textByHashes.01cca15ab0ae2d7cea1d2c2ba98695d9dbb335f7: I don't think I will survive much longer.
textByHashes.ea1dd259a6b5f383a1dc9b24b9f96054a8f03b16: I hadn't noticed. Who knows what danger lurks in the shadows. I'm so scared.
textByHashes.58436d15f59534cd1d3ef56a13d21c64e40c4d3a: Oh no, they're coming to get us!
textByHashes.74ab09a309ae8c9365119caea567ced6dce37545: Well it's a start, I suppose. Doesn't sound too promising.
textByHashes.682ec02db5e1b5adee2ba08d0545a1e31597bdc7: That's promising. Perhaps I will make it out of here.
textByHashes.4f8065cf17b8a8bcade69418858da26dc6022955: I don't know, probably days. I just can't remember.
textByHashes.b2eba1f8a630979eab5daf707dc8be3fe05eee5f: Me too. I'm so scared. Please don't leave me.
textByHashes.b19fe7564605700f8435049711939e1aadde9579: Definitely. A good wash, fresh clothes, a nice meal.
textByHashes.532016c2ffc7c509f6bbc8b7522e58e4ab4d50b7: Sorry, I was getting a bit over-excited there, I think.
textByHashes.1ac488cee01676cd685caee6cf2eb36a89980981: Thank you, your help really is appreciated.
textByHashes.877cbc01e363dd16b24d1cbc6591e830c5720c77: Wouldn't you if you were about to die?
textByHashes.f692a42e8948f3552ce7764ce66db4d1cf15edb6: True, I may never get out of here.
textByHashes.caa9f4132ed24f7c7ac12f43e6c13535fec8f05d: Oh no, oh no, oh no.
textByHashes.a0311c6d913fdbfacfa3080ef050bbc1c5e5c5fd: Ill? You can't feel ill, I'm depending on you!
textByHashes.9e1913ff2fdf88c21b733d65a6d66740d3e2957f: Ah, thanks. That's a really nice thing to say.
textByHashes.69afe12cba4edb63476dac3d97b74c814e23363c: Thank you. Right back at ya!
textByHashes.3e113d0c4102a2202d978a107fc586971f028def: You're right. I really should never have come to this island.
textByHashes.522da9f260af8def8960366c6f4a0c57278f32c3: No it's not, this is so embarrassing.
textByHashes.85c7c04e0f5165878604caba7e84ea5210556c29: Oh no. I don't think I can stand much more.
textByHashes.18a1581533fffa0d84a814411758d83dd02355cf: Air. I wish I could breathe fresh air.
textByHashes.7ff5d6dbe514db9b8dad99b3c858f860e7765f45: I must admit it was hard to crawl this far.
textByHashes.d3377abb75d3249bf44151df7c3f10da3555cab9: Really? I was determined to survive.
textByHashes.c4d9a664f5a78625a21c990e48ecd2209c14de95: I suppose so. But now that I think about it, I don't know why there are none down here.
textByHashes.d33aad9e094a62ab353d1213f493703735ff3c2c: I haven't really thought about it.
textByHashes.dba661d0c7af2db0e85d0119befdcae5830ed2c6: Yes, I am a bit scruffy at the moment.
textByHashes.abb3205f798dfed341c3e4269aa23c1e5a7451a9: Is it? I suppose so. Why do you say that?
textByHashes.9a8b527c1f77854c4e2f7a767b8947b3b62c2e4d: It wouldn't surprise me. I don't seem to be having much luck recently.
textByHashes.dfa183dd0b0876d4dbf67bcabb4e56f218f063d9: Oh, you scared me to death.
textByHashes.8ce7d92dabe3290d55d8e1c2475d697f16ff2323: I'll try, maybe when I feel a bit stronger.
textByHashes.fd7a09cb03ab6072941680ba61a3b2da485725d2: I... I... need you to help me.
textByHashes.25a90231f7dd698ff2815f20635d732d62c546ee: Well I don't know. What should I do?
textByHashes.3361933e15f5298d2a88c7a3c54e32eb8cbacfba: You'd do that for me? That sounds marvellous! I will look forward to it.
textByHashes.ab1ea33afde6b2d3b91cff26f9a10633cda2ffb2: You have a good point there.
textByHashes.8c9adfcf72096de69c9fe3cf459061078c63dff1: Perhaps. Oh, but I don't think I have any money left on me.
textByHashes.e0d4c706a7320613fa09ea677a4737615c844de2: Yes. Could you perhaps give me a blanket?
textByHashes.b2395de62a46774d4581c0a73007a9195d4c00d7: I'll probably be okay. Thanks, though.
textByHashes.8aafc2cf8450a038842e67c94a5920835cbd31ec: You ought to be careful with that attitude.
textByHashes.a96acc88b7693d814b17143fb0483386e493f46f: That's okay. I think you deserve it a bit for saving my life.
textByHashes.e8991c2e425362f646d7fa4220b7aa2466527ba7: Yes, I think I've been very lucky.
textByHashes.71522fe4cd812d1b2fdc50c7cb2cbd9b46005290: No. Could have been days. I don't remember much after stumbling down the ladder: just crawling.
textByHashes.cf5a8d329d9d2a66eebc72d00a0dcd6acd6c34ba: Oh, my friend, you really think so?
textByHashes.d229aee665499319fc505650932c5e1d2071489e: Oh no. Why can't I die peacefully?
textByHashes.f5a2db9ebe0e35ffa183211f3fcb81abe071a4ce: I'm so glad to have your help. I would never turn it down!
textByHashes.af1aa203cf96a36da440e769fcc71395efb00f1a: Depends on what the person is like.
textByHashes.7bb9562e699d135fb7669f53395ce723fdb94c9e: I know. It hurts to move.
textByHashes.4fdf433251169c6f7d50bc905bc275bf3560d97a: Time is something I don't have much of.
textByHashes.11ef27c84354b877d9e6e03330c0574ec5d68e96: Oh, no reason. Just thought you would help me out.
textByHashes.01c2a4d2a9d382f588e7b7b44ff7b1616a103522: I'm not too sure. What do you think?
textByHashes.2792c076336bcf59741b7bba259e6c50fa828dce: I am hungry. Sorry for eating all your food.
textByHashes.ca852c224157789eb727e696a25b2092feaf2a02: Is it really the time to?
textByHashes.25a3ee5a9df92f7c4fc62e63c250288b7076ec1a: That's a strange thing to say.
textByHashes.173efa55aa7128cd9ca6478cf74d944ee0488168: Not really, I think I'll stick to living ABOVE ground.
textByHashes.9e3666927d0b05a39d12c75644097dc103439d2d: Gas? Why would you smell gas?
textByHashes.61620a0ad13a7b29138da38695943f6da0bc0e1e: Please, let's talk about something else.
textByHashes.d005cd063fb61e6b914d44cc1a028193f98c2dd3: Sorry to stop you, but are you going to help me?
textByHashes.380500e62033657fac555810e3b4bcf10ee5906c: I don't know, I don't think I feel like talking.
textByHashes.9f8c44c90ff231326380deacefcf4db36e92c7c6: No, I think I'd rather be left alone.
textByHashes.c5756054b9ccec5e06b07dab9deac3b76af5ddf8: Well, I grew up in Ardougne. Erm, I quite enjoy Fishing.
textByHashes.e1f789f44d332648140c6b04e0f6b60adc1e4157: Don't knock it till you've tried it.
textByHashes.2dc34dd90535eda2ef3e65e2d0f90eb85edbfeb7: Perhaps we can fish together one day?
